chapter_title.en: The Chapter of Condolences and Grief During Calamities, Visiting Graves, Lamentation and Mourning Gatherings

parts.text: قَدْ وَضَعَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ

text: جِنَازَةِ سَعْدِ بْنِ مُعَاذٍ رَحِمَهُ اَللَّهُ فَسُئِلَ عَنْ ذَلِكَ فَقَالَ «إِنِّي رَأَيْتُ اَلْمَلاَئِكَةَ قَدْ وَضَعَتْ أَرْدِيَتَهَا فَوَضَعْتُ رِدَائِي.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.512 - "The Messenger of Allah (sw) placed his cloak down during the funeral of Sa'd ibn Mu'adh (may Allah (swt) have mercy on him).
When asked about this, He (sw) said:
"I saw the angels had placed their cloaks down, so I placed mine as well."
